name: collaborative-launch-hero
title: Collaborative Launch Hero
description: An editable hero block for collaboration/review products showing people active, a review underway, and one pending decision beside outcome copy + CTAs. Composes Live Presence Stack, Typing and Presence, Approval Workflow (one pending decision), Comment Thread, and Activity Stream across review-open/commenting/changes-requested/approval-pending/approved/rejected/resolved. App-controlled, clearly-fictional demo data. SSR-safe, reduced-motion-safe.
